description: Soroswap v1 router XLM->USDC swap recorded on Stellar testnet. Router contract: CCJUD55AG6W5HAI5LRVNKAE5WDP5XGZBUDS5WNTIVDU7O264UZZE7BRD (source: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/soroswap/core/main/public/testnet.contracts.json `ids.router`). Invoked function: swap_exact_tokens_for_tokens(amount_in: i128, amount_out_min: i128, path: Vec<Address>, to: Address, deadline: u64) -> Vec<i128>. args: amount_in=100000000 stroops XLM, amount_out_min=1 (intentionally loose to guarantee fill), path=[XLM SAC CDLZFC3S..., USDC SAC CB3TLW74...], to=source (self), deadline=1778890165 (unix ts, ~1h after submission). Submitted by source account GB6L7TKI77ZTTYAMQ2Z2YVSNLSADRFWNKTL5CPPNE7LDDZEKD6KI5C5K (p8-soroswap keypair, Friendbot-funded 2026-05-16); tx succeeded on-chain (status=SUCCESS). Output amounts vec [100000000, 1610680] confirms a real Soroswap pair swap landed (1.61 USDC base units for 10 XLM at the on-chain rate). This is the canonical Phase 8 Walkthrough 3 fixture: a real DEX swap with a fixed path the policy can pin via Track-B `bounded_swap` constraints (slippage tolerance, recipient pinning, deadline window).
